common_deviations: liquid_glass_renderer API incompatible - fallback to standard glass widgets
Build runner conflicts - use --delete-conflicting-outputs flag
Use entry.id.present instead of entry.id.value == null
Import drift with 'hide isNotNull, isNull' to avoid matcher conflicts
JOIN queries return JoinedRow - use r.readTable(entity) to extract
Cascade delete requires transaction() for atomicity
Stream subscription needs to be cancelled in dispose()
Auto-select first entity if none persisted
Grouped getters need to rebuild map from list on each access
Widget tests with streams may timeout - use pump() instead of pumpAndSettle()
Grouped ListView needs sorted keys for consistent ordering
Check parent list before showing child form - show snackbar if empty
withOpacity deprecated - use withValues(alpha: x)
Drift stream subscriptions cause pumpAndSettle() to hang
Workaround: await tester.pumpWidget(Container()) at test end
Alternative: Use pump() with fixed duration instead of pumpAndSettle()
Indirect relationship requires JOIN query
Cascade delete with warning dialog
Grouped display by parent entity
Multi-meter aggregation: interpolate per-meter independently then sum
Gas conversion applied post-aggregation in provider layer
Custom range must be cleared on month navigation
Overview needs wider lookback (6 months) than detail view
Extend existing provider for yearly state — don't create new provider
Separate provider for pre-aggregated data (smart plugs) — different data flow
Other/residual: max(0, total - tracked), null when no source data
BarChartGroupData.x requires int - use sequential index
FlSpot.nullSpot for line gaps - guard with .any() before rendering
No built-in legend - build custom ChartLegend widget
Widget tests can't inspect CustomPainter canvas - test data transformation instead
12-month x-axis labels crowded - show every-other-month: index % 2 != 0 skip
Two-line overlay: solid for primary, dashArray [8,4] + 50% opacity for secondary
PieChart donut: centerSpaceRadius 40, sectionsSpace 2, startDegreeOffset -90
Grey slice (0xFF9E9E9E) for residual/Other in pie charts
Hub screen with context.watch, detail screens with context.read for navigation
Date range picker requires MaterialApp ancestor in widget tests
Export FAB conditional on data availability
context.mounted check required after async export operations
SegmentedButton for period selection (Material 3 standard)
Two navigation entry points: analytics hub card + source screen AppBar icon
Use csv package ListToCsvConverter - handles quoting/escaping automatically
Const constructor + static const converter for stateless service
Conditional 'Previous Year' column when data exists
Optional cost column: conditional header + if (hasCost) in row builder
Write to getTemporaryDirectory() first, then share via Share.shareXFiles
Set mimeType: 'text/csv' on XFile for proper system handling
SegmentedButton<ThemeMode> for 3-way theme toggle — requires Set wrapper
StatefulWidget for TextField to manage TextEditingController lifecycle
PackageInfo.fromPlatform() async — use FutureBuilder with placeholder
SegmentedButton icons not findable via find.byIcon — use find.byType
ListView scroll in tests: use tester.drag not scrollUntilVisible (multiple Scrollable issue)
Colors.white in fl_chart dot painters — getDotPainter needs context parameter
Colors.white70/Colors.black54 in glass widgets — use colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
Colors.redAccent/Colors.green semantic colors — add AppColors.heatingColor/successColor
inline Color(0xFF...) constants — extract to named AppColors
JSON num → double casting: (json['key'] as num?)?.toDouble()
Tiered pricing: cumulative tiers, last tier has null limit (unlimited)
Standing charge pro-rating: standingCharge * (daysInPeriod / daysInMonth)
Negative consumption clamped to 0
Empty/null tiers JSON → fall back to flat unitPrice
Adding new section to settings pushes existing sections off-viewport in tests
scrollUntilVisible() more robust than fixed tester.drag offset
registerFallbackValue() needed for custom types used with any() matcher
StatefulWidget _CostConfigCard per meter type with own TextEditingControllers
didUpdateWidget to sync controllers when config ID changes
Use m.createTable(newTable) in onUpgrade — Drift handles column types
Generated CostConfig class in app_database.g.dart — import app_database.dart
intEnum<T>() for enum columns in table definition
Text column with .withDefault(const Constant('€')) for currency symbol
